title: Excel export of the capacity manager in multiple views

posts.author: Kathrynbell (Kathryn Bell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The current excel export only allows you to export data from the capacity planner showing the blocks of time allocation. The view is more helpful when shown as hours or % effort per person.

What are you trying to achieve

By exporting as a number of hours per month or a % effort per month to excel, we would be able to add our own formulas in excel to calculate average allocations per person etc. where currently there is no way to analyse this data.
